lines.text: Welcome back. [pause] The clock reads 03:00. We are {{ELAPSED}} into the Purge.
I want you to find your breath again. [pause] It's still there.
In through the nose. [pause] Hold. [pause] Out through the mouth.
Your shoulders are tight. I can feel them through the radio. [pause] Release them.
The people outside are not your concern right now. [pause] They made their choices.
You made yours. [pause] You stayed. That matters.
Body scan. Start at your feet. Are they warm? [pause] Cold?
Move up. Calves. Thighs. Notice what's tight. Notice what's loose.
Stomach. [pause] Most of you are knotted here. The fear lives in the stomach.
Breathe into it. [pause] You don't have to untie it. Just know it's there.
Chest. Heart. [pause] Still beating. Still working. Still you.
There's interference on the line tonight. [pause] Can you hear it?
That's not the Order transmitting. [pause] That's the night.
The night has a voice when you listen long enough.
Shoulders again. Neck. The place where you hold the weight of decisions you didn't make.
Head. Scalp. [pause] The part of you that thinks it should be planning. Should be afraid.
I want you to release that thought. [pause] It's not serving you anymore.
Close your eyes if they aren't already closed. [pause] See the dark.
The dark is not empty. [pause] The dark is full of people who chose this, like you.
Seventy thousand listeners on the Purge Radio network. [pause] Seventy thousand people in the dark together.
You are not alone in your barricade. [pause] You are part of something.
We are part of something.
Breathe. [pause] The night is two-thirds over now. {{ELAPSED}} behind us.
Four hours left. [pause] Four hours is nothing. Four hours is a lifetime.
I've been meditating for forty-two years. [pause] Time becomes strange after a while.
Sometimes I see people in the dark. [pause] Not here. Not in this room.
People who came before. [pause] People who stayed home too.
They're not here to hurt you. [pause] They're just... here.
Kah-leth-mora ven-sai. [pause] Forgive me. Sometimes the words come from somewhere else.
The Order teaches us that silence has layers. [pause] Each layer is a choice.
The first layer: silence from sound. [pause] That's easy. You're doing it now.
The second layer: silence from thought. [pause] That's harder.
The third layer: silence from self. [pause] That's where the light lives.
I wonder if you've reached that layer tonight. [pause] Some of you have. I can feel it.
There's static on the line again. [pause] The signal's breaking up.
Or maybe that's just what the Purge sounds like at this hour. [pause] Raw. Unfiltered.
If you're listening to PRGE right now, you made a specific choice. [pause] You could be in darkness. You chose words instead.
That's a form of resistance. [pause] Most people don't understand that yet.
Tucker reported from East Side earlier. [pause] Kill count up. Always up in East Side.
And you're still here. [pause] Breathing. Listening. Refusing.
Return to the body. [pause] Shoulders. Neck. Jaw.
Your jaw is clenched. [pause] You've been clenching since 19:00. Let it go.
Open your mouth slightly. [pause] Feel the relief.
This is what surrender feels like. [pause] Not giving up. Giving in to what is.
The Purge is. [pause] You are safe in your barricade or you are not. [pause] That was decided hours ago.
All that's left is to breathe. [pause] To exist in the space between heartbeats.
We're {{ELAPSED}} now. [pause] The worst hours. The deepest dark.
The night is thinning. [pause] You can almost feel the dawn thinking about arriving.
Four more hours. [pause] Then the light.
You'll make it. [pause] You always do.

tickerItems.text: Madison-wide kill count: 153. Up 14 from this point last year. East Side contributing 38% of tonight's total.
State Street Ruins: confirmed group activity 23:00-00:30 hrs. Cleanup operations post-07:00. Avoid.
"The silence has layers. You're learning to climb them."
Lake Mendota shoreline: volunteer recovery crew still active. Water temp 28°F. Do not attempt self-rescue. Report sightings to PRGE dispatch.
Signal interference detected on backup frequency bands. This is normal during deep-night hours. PRGE operating on primary transmission. Stay tuned.
